See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 24762 => 'US Base', 24763 => 'Travellers Hill & Airhead', 24764 => 'Two Boats', 24766 => 'Georgetown', 24767 => 'Georgetown', ];
